title: Tab bar component with drag-and-drop reordering and tab management
purpose: Provides a tab bar interface with draggable tabs, tab activation, closing, pinning, and promotion functionality for managing session tabs.
module_context: Exports TabBar component and SortableTab helper component. Uses DnD Kit for drag-and-drop functionality and integrates with tabs and session stores.

steps.content: Initialize sortable behavior for the tab using DnD Kit.
Apply computed transform and transition styles from sortable context.
Render the tab component with all provided props and sortable attributes.
Set the active tab ID in the tabs store.
Get the current session store state.
IF the tab is an embed kind, select the corresponding embed artifact.
ELSE IF the tab is a code-file kind, select the corresponding pseudo path.
ELSE IF the tab is an artifact kind with a type, route to the appropriate artifact selection based on type.
Extract the active and over drag items from the event.
IF the active and over items are different, calculate their indices in the tab list.
IF either index is invalid, exit early.
Reorder the tab IDs using arrayMove based on the calculated indices.
Update the tab order in the tabs store with the new tab IDs.
Load the current tabs and active tab ID from the session tabs store.
Extract tab management functions from the tabs store.
Filter and sort tabs into permanent and preview categories.
Initialize drag-and-drop sensors with pointer activation constraint.
Render the tab bar container with DnD context and sortable tabs.
Display permanent tabs first, followed by a spacer, then preview tabs.
